sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28857" key="du/seiktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσ-εικτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unyielding, stiff</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:11:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
